name: OmopImmunizationDrugExposure
title: OMOP-Convertible Immunization → drug_exposure
description: A FHIR Immunization that can be converted to an OMOP `drug_exposure` row of type 32827 (EHR administration record) / equivalent. Routing key: `vaccineCode` must be in the OMOP Drug domain (CVX / RxNorm — CVX maps to RxNorm Extension and is classified Drug-domain in OMOP). Only completed immunizations produce rows.

element.comment: Only completed immunizations are converted. entered-in-error and not-done are skipped.

binding.description: Routing key. CVX (http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx) is preferred; RxNorm and SNOMED CT vaccine codes are also accepted. CVX maps via concept_relationship to RxNorm Extension and is Drug-domain in OMOP. Pending a dedicated Vaccine ValueSet, the broader Drug ValueSet is reused.

element.comment: Required for drug_exposure.drug_exposure_start_date / _end_date. Immunizations are point-in-time events: start_date = end_date.
